channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Dreame’s self-cleaning L10s Pro Ultra is nearly $1,000 off its original list price
item.description: Amazon’s Big Spring Sale doesn’t kick off until next week, but the retailer is already dropping a host of good deals, especially on robot vacuums. We recently saw Ecovacs’ Deebot X8 and X9 Pro Omni drop to $599 ($501 off) and $679 ($621 off), respectively; however, if you’re looking for a cheaper robot vacuum / […]

item.title: 'I've tasted blood, I've worn it' — how The Pitt season 2 prepped Shawn Hatosy for the guts and gore of Ready or Not 2: Here I Come
item.description: We're treated to double helpings of Shawn Hatosy this week in The Pitt season 2 and Ready or Not 2, and his time in the ER was the weirdest kind of preparation possible.

item.title: Chez Darty, le Xiaomi 15T (Amoled, 120 Hz) s’accompagne des Redmi Buds 6 dans un pack vendu avec une réduction de presque 30 %
item.description: Avec ce pack smartphone et écouteurs de la marque Xiaomi, vous aurez entre les mains deux appareils qui brillent grâce à leur autonomie pour à peine plus de 500 euros.

item.title: 71 Best Podcasts (2026): True Crime, Culture, Science, Fiction
item.description: Get your fix of tech, true crime, pop culture, or comedy with these audio adventures.

item.title: The new MacBook Pro is still fast as hell
item.description: Apple's flagship 16-inch MacBook Pro has reigned supreme in the world of creator-focused laptops since its M-series processor overhaul in 2021. Since then, we've mostly seen the same design with year-over-year chip bumps and small refinements. "If it ain't broke," right? If you want to know everything about this machine, you can read our review […]

item.title: An early contender for movie of the year
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 120, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, get ready for Pen Opinions, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been reading about Banksy and music apps and influencer agents, watching […]

item.title: Engadget review recap: Lots of Apple devices, Galaxy S26, Dell XPS 16 and more
item.description:
Apple already announced a lot of new devices in 2026 and we’ve been busy reviewing them all. In this installment of our bi-weekly roundup, we revisit the MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e and more, in addition to the “regular” Galaxy S26 and Dell XPS 16. There’s even more than those gadget to catch up on, so sit back, relax and cozy up to some fresh reviews. Apple MacBook Neo
The main attraction for Apple’s early device deluge was the $599 MacBook Neo. The company is finally giving us something we’ve been begging for: a low-cost Mac laptop that’s good enough for most people. “It's a $599 computer tha...

item.title: Best Protein Bars (2026): Vegan, Gluten-Free, High Fiber
item.description: What to prioritize, what to skip, when to enjoy—plus, we’ve selected WIRED's favorite bars worth trying.

item.title: Gemini task automation is slow, clunky, and super impressive
item.description: I've been testing out Gemini's new task automation on the Pixel 10 Pro and the Galaxy S26 Ultra, which for the first time lets Gemini take the wheel and use apps for you. It's limited to a small subset right now - a handful of food delivery and rideshare services - and it's still in […]

item.title: Wired earbuds are in right now, and this budget-friendly pair from Sennheiser are so good I’d spend my own money on them
item.description: Yes, wired earbuds are trendy again, and this cheap set is all you need for beautiful compression-free audio.

item.title: Considering a complete wireless turntable setup? I've created 4 simple vinyl systems, featuring Bluetooth and Sonos-compatible options
item.description: Want to get into wire-free vinyl but don't know how to start? You'll need a nice simple system — and this little quartet all come recommended by an audio editor.

item.title: It's actually happening — Microsoft promises to fix the biggest issues in Windows 11, from AI slop to pushy Windows Updates
item.description: Microsoft has promised that Windows 11 will get a lot better over the next year, and it appears to be off to a great start.

item.title: A retro Starship Troopers shooter, a video store sim and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Welcome to our latest roundup of what's going on in the indie game space. There are a whole bunch of neat new games out this week, as well as updates on some interesting upcoming projects. In case you missed it, the Steam Spring Sale is under way. There are lots of solid deals here, and my credit card is already screaming at me. I've picked up a bunch of games from my wishlist. For instance, at just $3, I couldn't resist snagging Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Splintered Fate.Meanwhile, over on Bluesky, a prototype from developer Freya Holmér caught my eye. It's for a falling-block game, but in...

item.title: Ce roman d’horreur vient d’être retiré de la vente en urgence, son auteur ne serait pas totalement humain
item.description: Soupçonné d'avoir été rédigé par une intelligence artificielle, le roman d'horreur « Shy Girl » ne verra pas le jour chez Hachette aux États-Unis.

item.title: Aiper Scuba V3 Pool Robot Review: Eye on the Prize
item.description: Now outfitted with AI computer vision, this new pool cleaner can actively search for debris.

item.title: How brands can leverage AI while prioritizing a human touch for the most brilliant ideas
item.description: ‘I want it to feel like it’s made by humans.’ —Andy Pearson, Liquid Death’s VP of creative, at the Fast Company Grill at SXSW To sell the idea of last year’s Wienie 500 to Oscar Mayer, creative agency Johannes Leonardo used AI to show what a race among the iconic Wienermobiles might look like when they took to the Indianapolis Motor Speedway’s historic oval....

item.title: I Tried DoorDash’s Tasks App and Saw the Bleak Future of AI Gig Work
item.description: I recorded videos of myself doing laundry, scrambling eggs, and walking around the park in DoorDash’s new Tasks app, where gig workers are paid to train AI.

item.title: Kodiak CEO says making trucks drive themselves is only half the battle
item.description: This year is shaping up to be a big one for self-driving trucks. In addition to Aurora's plan to deploy hundreds of autonomous big rigs and Waabi expanding into robotaxis, you've also got Kodiak AI aiming to launch its own fully driverless long-haul freight operation by the end of 2026. While robotaxis may still win […]

item.title: DLSS 5 : date de sortie, cartes compatibles, rendu neuronal… Tout savoir sur la technologie de Nvidia
item.description: Nvidia a offert un premier aperçu du DLSS 5 cette semaine lors de sa grande conférence de la GTC. Voici tout ce que nous savons à date sur la technologie tant décriée ces derniers jours et les réponses aux questions que tout le monde se pose.
